summary: Verifies and derives local free or paid billing status and returns local user profile data for Appwrite users.
responsibilities: Upsert local user records from verified Appwrite account data.
Derive paid status from active or trialing Stripe subscriptions.
Keep users.plan_status synchronized with latest known Stripe state.
Return local user fields needed for dashboard general account display.
Create Stripe subscription Checkout Sessions for verified users using server-only Stripe configuration.
invariants: Callers must verify Appwrite identity before passing user data to this module.
No client-provided plan status may be trusted.
Missing Stripe subscription state must resolve to free.
Returned local user profile must be derived from the verified Appwrite identity and SQL row.
Checkout sessions must use STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_PRO_PRICE_ID, and APP_URL from server environment.
